what: A simple model for grain yield
title: Using nert to augment agricultural analytics with SMIPS data
text: First, model grain yield simple model without taking account soil moisture confounding—, without reference SMIPS data just downloaded. later incorporate SMIPS data see including soil moisture covariate improves nitrogen treatment effect size estimates. use {nlme} package fit linear mixed-effect model. grain yield Yield_Tha modelled taking Variety, nitrogen application rate Nitrogen_kgNha seeding rate SeedRate_plantsm2 fixed terms, incorporating Site replicate (Rep) structure experiment random effect term. can check confidence intervals effect sizes nitrogen treatments simple model:
code: library(nlme)  simple_model <- lme(   fixed = Yield_Tha ~ Variety * Nitrogen_kgNha * SeedRate_plantsm2,   random = ~ 1 | Site / Rep,   data = grain ) simple_model.ints <- intervals(simple_model, which = "fixed")$fixed simple_model.Neffects <- simple_model.ints[paste0("Nitrogen_kgNha", c(30, 60, 90)), ] simple_model.Neffects #>                        lower      est.     upper #> Nitrogen_kgNha30 -0.17355028 0.0392950 0.2521403 #> Nitrogen_kgNha60  0.08045472 0.2933000 0.5061453 #> Nitrogen_kgNha90  0.09779306 0.3106383 0.5234836

what: Augmenting the yield model with soil moisture data
title: Using nert to augment agricultural analytics with SMIPS data
text: Next, augment modelling including SMIPS soil moisture data covariate (perhaps anticipating soil moisture improves yield, might reduce effect nitrogen applied soil due volatilisation). keep things simple, site (associated nitrogen application date) take average SMIPS-reported soil moisture index date nitrogen application 30 days application, store new column called SoilMoisture_avg. can add average soil moisture fixed effect linear mixed-effect model: confidence intervals effect sizes nitrogen application treatments augmented model follows: can use {ggplot2} plotting graph confidence intervals simple model versus augmented model, illuminate difference attained include soil moisture confounding term modelling: Nitrogen effect estimates compared simple model SMIPS-augmented model. comparison effect sizes nitrogen treatment, can see ignoring effect soil moisture simple model underestimates direct nitrogen treatment effect. augmented model, contrast, accounts soil moisture potential nitrogen volatilisation may occur higher soil moisture conditions.
code: for (site in sites$Site) {   start_date <- unique(grain[which(grain$Site == site), "NitrogenDate"])[1]   dates <- seq(start_date, start_date + 30, by = "1 day")   smips <- smips_data[which(smips_data$Site == site & smips_data$Date %in% dates), ]   smips_avg <- mean(smips[["smips_smi"]])   grain[which(grain$Site == site), "SoilMoisture_avg"] <- smips_avg } augmented_model <- lme(   fixed = Yield_Tha ~ Variety * Nitrogen_kgNha * SeedRate_plantsm2     + SoilMoisture_avg + SoilMoisture_avg:Nitrogen_kgNha,   random = ~ 1 | Site / Rep,   data = grain ) augmented_model.ints <- intervals(augmented_model, which = "fixed")$fixed augmented_model.Neffects <- augmented_model.ints[paste0("Nitrogen_kgNha", c(30, 60, 90)), ] augmented_model.Neffects #>                        lower      est.     upper #> Nitrogen_kgNha30 -0.03984861 0.2000454 0.4399395 #> Nitrogen_kgNha60  0.31409573 0.5539898 0.7938838 #> Nitrogen_kgNha90  0.33961765 0.5795117 0.8194058 library(ggplot2)  ci <- rbind(   data.frame(simple_model.Neffects, model = "Simple Model"),   data.frame(augmented_model.Neffects, model = "SMIPS-Augmented Model") ) ci$term <- paste0("Nitrogen_kgNha", c(30, 60, 90))  pd <- position_dodge(-0.4) ggplot(ci, aes(x = est., y = term, colour = model)) +   scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +   geom_point(position = pd) +   geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), position = pd, height = 0.2) +   labs(y = "predictor", x = "estimate")

title: Using nert to augment agricultural analytics with SMIPS data
text: Note previously used loops collect SMIPS data across range dates spatial locations. However {nert} version 0.0.3.9000, collect_tern_data() function made available, streamlines typical data aggregation task. Collecting SMindex time series across different trial locations can now achieved single call:
code: smips_dt <- collect_tern_data(   xy = data.frame(lon = sites$Longitude, lat = sites$Latitude),   date_range = c(min(grain$NitrogenDate), max(grain$NitrogenDate) + 30),   datasets = "SMIPS",   smips_collection = "SMindex",   verbose = FALSE ) head(smips_dt) #>          date      lon       lat SMIPS_SMindex #>        <Date>    <num>     <num>         <num> #> 1: 2022-05-07 138.6244 -34.94773    0.25906488 #> 2: 2022-05-07 138.9580 -34.54843    0.17677850 #> 3: 2022-05-07 138.6012 -33.83754    0.07674548 #> 4: 2022-05-07 135.7967 -34.37378    0.53408158 #> 5: 2022-05-07 138.4608 -35.52307    0.37496096 #> 6: 2022-05-07 137.0736 -35.71041    0.30223876

what: Curated Access to TERN Environmental Raster Data
title: Curated Access to TERN Environmental Raster Data
text: {nert} package streamlines access various Cloud-Optimised GeoTIFF (COG) datasets provided Australian Terrestrial Ecosystem Research Network (TERN), allowing easily incorporate environmental datasets R analytics. Currently supported datasets {nert} package include: Daily volumetric soil moisture estimates Soil Moisture Integration Prediction System (SMIPS), Actual evapotranspiration estimates using CSIRO MODIS Reflectance-based Scaling EvapoTranspiration (CMRSET) algorithm, Soil orders Australian Soil Classification Map, Canopy height estimates OzTreeMap best-pick canopy height model, Australian land surface phenology based thresholded MODIS Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) data, Soil Landscape Grid Australia (SLGA) datasets, including available volumetric water capacity, clay/sand/silt content, Bulk Density (whole earth) measurements, soil pH (CaCl2 water), nitrogen phosphorus content, cation exchange capacity, drained upper limit 15-bar lower limit water content readings, Soil bacteria soil fungi Beta Diversity datasets.

what: Example: reading a SMIPS COG as a spatial object
title: Curated Access to TERN Environmental Raster Data
text: {nert} package provides number convenient functions read_smips() allow fetch COGs TERN Data Portal use R session. code fetches SMIPS soil moisture raster 1st January 2024, uses {terra} package’s extract() function get soil moisture estimate Adelaide CBD. Note since cloud-optimised COGs, employ Just--Time data streaming: , bytes necessary spatial extent actually need downloaded, resulting significant time disk-space savings. {nert} package also re-exports {tidyterra}’s autoplot() function, can used create visualisation Australia-wide data rasters.
code: library(nert) library(terra) #> terra 1.9.34  r <- read_smips(date = "2024-01-01") extract(r, xy = TRUE, data.frame(lon = 138.6007, lat = -34.9285)) #>   ID smips_totalbucket_mm_20240101        x         y #> 1  1                      46.07692 138.6037 -34.93254 autoplot(r) #> <SpatRaster> resampled to 501270 cells.

what: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
text: Extract values one TERN datasets given location(s) given set range dates. Returns data.table one row per date/location, one column per dataset requested. (Note static datasets repeated across dates consistency.)

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
code: collect_tern_data(   date_range,   dates,   lon = NULL,   lat = NULL,   xy = NULL,   datasets = NULL,   depth = NULL,   stat = NULL,   smips_collection = NULL,   asc_collection = NULL,   aet_collection = NULL,   soildiv_collection = NULL,   phenology_collection = NULL,   api_key = NULL,   max_tries = NULL,   initial_delay = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   na.rm = FALSE )

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
text: date_range Date vector character vector length 2, [start_date, end_date], indicating start end date used TERN dataset retrieval. (vector length greater 2 given, parameter works exactly dates .) Omit specifying exact dates via dates argument instead. dates Date vector character vector, indicating exact set dates TERN datasets retrieved. Takes precedence date_range supplied. lon Longitude(s) (WGS84, EPSG:4326).  Numeric scalar vector (length lat).  Omit using xy notation. lat Latitude(s) (WGS84, EPSG:4326).  Numeric scalar vector (length lon).  Omit using xy notation. xy Optional: data.frame, data.table, matrix coordinate columns named lon/lat x/y.  Takes precedence lon/lat supplied. datasets character vector dataset aliases collect. (Default=datasets.) Options: "SMIPS", "ASC", "AET", "AWC", "CLY", "SND", "SLT", "BDW", "PHC", "PHW", "NTO", "AVP", "PTO", "CEC", "ECE", "DUL", "L15", "SOILDIV", "CANOPY", "PHENOLOGY". Use NULL (default) "" specify retrieval available datasets. depth SLGA datasets. character vector containing depth interval(s) SLGA soil attributes collect. (Default=depths.) Options: "000_005", "005_015", "015_030", "030_060", "060_100", "100_200". Use NULL (default) "" specify retrieval available depths. parameter ignored non-SLGA datasets. stat SLGA datasets. character vector containing statistic retrieve SLGA datasets. (Default=statistics.) Options: "EV" (estimated value), "05" (lower, 5th-percentile bound), "95" (upper, 95th-percentile bound); 05 95 layers together span 90% interval. Use NULL (default) "" specify retrieval statistics. parameter ignored non-SLGA datasets. smips_collection SMIPS datasets. character vector containing SMIPS datasets retrieved. (Default=SMIPS datasets.) Options: "totalbucket", "SMindex", "bucket1", "bucket2", "deepD", "runoff". Use NULL (default) "" specify retrieval SMIPS datasets. parameter ignored non-SMIPS datasets. asc_collection ASC datasets. character vector specifying Australian Soil Classification Map datasets retrieved. (Default=ASC datasets.) Options: "EV" (estimated soil order), "CI" (confusion index). Use NULL (default) "" specify retrieval ASC datasets. aet_collection AET datasets. character vector specifying Actual Evapotranspiration datasets retrieved. (Default=AET datasets.) Options: "ETa", "pixel_qa" (quality assurance flags). Use NULL (default) "" specify retrieval AET datasets. parameter ignored non-AET datasets. soildiv_collection SOILDIV datasets. character vector specifying beta soil diversity NMDS axes retrieved. (Default=axes/datasets.) Options: "Bacteria_NMDS1", "Bacteria_NMDS2", "Bacteria_NMDS3", "Fungi_NMDS1", "Fungi_NMDS2", "Fungi_NMDS3". Use NULL (default) "" specify retrieval SOILDIV axes/datasets. phenology_collection PHENOLOGY datasets. character vector specifying phenology datasets retrieved. (Default=PHENOLOGY datasets.) Options: "SGS", "PGS", "EGS", "LGS", "EVI1", "EVI2", "EVIP", "EVII", "SGS_month", "PGS_month", "EGS_month". Use NULL (default) "" specify retrieval PHENOLOGY datasets. api_key character string containing TERN API key. Defaults automatic detection .Renviron .Rprofile.  See get_key() setup. max_tries Maximum number download retries error raised. Default=NULL, case maximum retry number resolved option nert.max_tries option exists. (Defaults 3 retries nert.max_tries set.) initial_delay Initial retry delay seconds (doubles attempt). Default=NULL, case initial delay resolved option nert.initial_delay option exists. (Defaults 1 second initial delay nert.initial_delay set.) verbose Logical.  TRUE, print progress messages. (Default=TRUE.) na.rm Logical.  TRUE, drop rows dataset columns NA. (Default=FALSE).

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
text: data.table following columns: date: Date. lon, lat: spatial coordinates (always included; constant single location requested). One column per dataset requested. dataset columns named alias prefix (e.g., SMIPS, AWC, SOILDIV), followed variant information (e.g., depth, statistic, dataset name) underscore. example, SMIPS_totalbucket SMIPS "totalbucket" dataset, CLY_05_000_005 lower (05) percentile limit soil clay 0-5cm depth, .

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
text: Failure handling. Note COG fetch fails (.e., successful download max_tries), corresponding column(s) set NA affected rows, cli::cli_warn() warning emitted.

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() # Single location, single dataset dates <- seq(as.Date("2024-01-01"), as.Date("2024-01-05"), by = "day") d_t <- collect_tern_data(   date_range = dates,   lon = 138.6,   lat = -34.9,   datasets = c("SMIPS", "CLY") ) head(d_t)  # Multiple locations (vectorised across points within each COG) d_t_multi <- collect_tern_data(   lon = c(138.6, 139.5),   lat = c(-34.9, -35.5),   date_range = dates,   datasets = c("SMIPS", "CANOPY") )  # xy data.frame notation xy <- data.frame(lon = c(138.6, 139.5), lat = c(-34.9, -35.5)) d_t_xy <- collect_tern_data(   xy = xy,   date_range = dates,   datasets = "CLY" )  }

what: nert: Curated Access to TERN Environmental Raster Data — nert-package
title: nert: Curated Access to TERN Environmental Raster Data — nert-package
text: Provides curated access gridded environmental data published Australia's Terrestrial Ecosystem Research Network (TERN; https://www.tern.org.au/), spanning national soil attribute, soil classification, soil biodiversity, soil moisture, actual evapotranspiration, vegetation canopy height phenology products. package reads Cloud-Optimised GeoTIFF virtual raster files directly TERN data server via GDAL '/vsicurl' range requests, streaming requested spatial temporal subset efficient data transfer. environmental raster data returned terra::SpatRaster objects. convenient helper function also provided provides batch-download capability given specific locations dates, returning extracted data values analysis-ready data.table. Access TERN datasets using package requires TERN API key.

title: Read CMRSET Actual Evapotranspiration Data from TERN — read_aet
text: Wrapper around read_tern() retrieving CMRSET actual evapotranspiration data (v2.2) TERN Data Portal. dataset provides monthly estimates actual ET (mm/month) 30 m resolution May 1987 onwards, using CSIRO MODIS Reflectance-based Scaling Evapotranspiration (CMRSET) algorithm combines potential evapotranspiration data Bureau Meteorology together satellite image data provided MODIS, VIIRS, Landsat Sentinel-2.

title: Read CMRSET Actual Evapotranspiration Data from TERN — read_aet
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() # Actual evapotranspiration (ETa) for June 2023 (mm/month) r_eta <- read_aet("2023-06-01") autoplot(r_eta)  # January 2023 ET r_jan <- read_aet("2023-01-01")  # Quality assurance flags for June 2023 r_qa <- read_aet("2023-06-01", collection = "pixel_qa")  # ET from May 1987 (earliest available) r_early <- read_aet("1987-05-01")  # Current/recent ET (within last month) r_recent <- read_aet(Sys.Date()) }

title: Read Land Surface Phenology from TERN — read_phenology
text: Eleven phenological metrics available via collection argument: "SGS" Start Growing Season (default). number -150 345 indicating start growing season (negative numbers meaning prior year). "PGS" Peak Growing Season. number 9 361 indicating day year peak growing season. "EGS" End Growing Season. number 25 519 indicating day year marks end growing season, numbers 365 (366 leap years) meaning following year. "LGS" Length Growing Season, measured days. "EVI1" Minimum EVI peak. unitless index 0 10000 (.e., scaled 10000) minimum value Enhanced Vegetation Index peak growing season. "EVI2" Minimum EVI peak. unitless index 0 10000 (.e., scaled 10000) minimum value Enhanced Vegetation Index peak growing season. "EVIP" Peak EVI. unitless index 0 10000 (.e., scaled 10000) value Enhanced Vegetation Index peak growing season. "EVII" Integral EVI across season. calculated integral Enhanced Vegetation Index (including factor 10000 scaling) growing season cycle curve. "SGS_month" Start growing season month. number 1 12, indicating month start growing season (.e., "SGS" metric reprocessed monthly time resolution). "PGS_month" Peak growing season month. number 1 12, indicating month peak growing season (.e., "PGS" metric reprocessed monthly time resolution). "EGS_month" End growing season month. number 1 12, indicating month end growing season (.e., "EGS" metric reprocessed monthly time resolution).

what: Read SMIPS Soil Moisture Data from TERN — read_smips
title: Read SMIPS Soil Moisture Data from TERN — read_smips
text: Wrapper around read_tern() retrieving SMIPS v1.0 daily soil moisture data TERN Data Portal. SMIPS provides soil moisture estimates roughly 1km X 1km spatial resolution across Australia, updated approximately daily TERN server. earliest available raster depends collection: "totalbucket" "SMindex" collections archived 2005, four bucket-level collections ("bucket1", "bucket2", "deepD", "runoff") available 1st January 2015.

title: Read SMIPS Soil Moisture Data from TERN — read_smips
code: read_smips(   date,   collection = "totalbucket",   api_key = NULL,   max_tries = NULL,   initial_delay = NULL )

title: Read SMIPS Soil Moisture Data from TERN — read_smips
text: date day download (Date character, e.g. "2024-01-15" .Date("2024-01-15")). collection SMIPS collection variant (default "totalbucket"). Options: "totalbucket" Soil moisture 0-90cm two-bucket store (mm). estimate volumetric soil moisture complete 0-90cm SMIPS two-bucket soil moisture store. "SMindex" Soil moisture index, 0-1. unitless index 0.0 1.0, approximating full complete SMIPS 0-90cm soil moisture two-bucket store . "bucket1" Soil moisture upper 0-10cm bucket (mm). estimate volumetric soil moisture upper 0-10cm soil bucket. "bucket2" Soil moisture lower 10-90cm bucket (mm). estimate volumetric soil moisture lower 10-90cm soil bucket. "deepD" Drainage two buckets (mm). estimate drainage upper 0-10cm soil bucket lower 10-90cm bucket. "runoff" Runoff/overtopping moisture loss (mm). estimate moisture lost top 0-10cm bucket due runoff overtopping. api_key character string containing TERN API key. Defaults automatic detection .Renviron .Rprofile.  See get_key() setup. max_tries Maximum number download retries error raised. Default=NULL, case maximum retry number resolved option nert.max_tries option exists. (Defaults 3 retries nert.max_tries set.) initial_delay Initial retry delay seconds (doubles attempt). Default=NULL, case initial delay resolved option nert.initial_delay option exists. (Defaults 1 second initial delay nert.initial_delay set.)

Data availability: totalbucket SMindex 2005-01-01; bucket1, bucket2, deepD, runoff 2015-01-01; today. (Updated regularly.)

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: 14 SLGA (Soil Landscape Grid Australia) soil attributes available static 90 m products, six standard depth layers three statistics: depth One "000_005" (default), "005_015", "015_030", "030_060", "060_100", "100_200" (cm). collection One "EV" (estimated value, default), "05" (lower, 5th-percentile bound) "95" (upper, 95th-percentile bound). 05 95 layers together span 90% interval, per SLGA product definition. Supported attributes (use dataset_id alias): "AWC" Available Water Capacity (percent) "CLY" Clay content (percent) "SND" Sand content (percent) "SLT" Silt content (percent) "BDW" Bulk Density whole earth (g/cm3) "PHC" pH (CaCl2) "PHW" pH (water) "NTO" Total Nitrogen (percent) "AVP" Available Phosphorus (mg/kg) "PTO" Total Phosphorus (percent) "CEC" Cation Exchange Capacity (meq/100g) "ECE" Effective Cation Exchange Capacity (meq/100g) "DUL" Drained Upper Limit volumetric water content (percent) "L15" 15 Bar Lower Limit volumetric water content (percent)

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: collection One "Bacteria" (default) "Fungi". axis NMDS axis: 1 (default), 2, 3.

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: Single static 30 m X 30 m best-pick canopy height model composite, OzTreeMap project. function arguments required.

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: year Required. integer year (2003–2018). season Season number: 1 (default) 2. collection Phenology metric — one "SGS" (Start Growing Season, default), "PGS" (Peak Growing Season), "EGS" (End Growing Season), "LGS" (Length Growing Season), "EVI1" (Minimum EVI peak), "EVI2" (Minimum EVI peak), "EVIP" (EVI Peak Growing Season), "EVII" (Integral EVI growing season curve), "SGS_month" (Start Growing Season, monthly resolution), "PGS_month" (Peak Growing Season, monthly resolution), "EGS_month" (End Growing Season, monthly resolution).

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: following datasets tracked TERN catalogue accessed via COG HTTP range requests: TERN/0997cb3c — Seasonal Fractional Cover (Landsat) TERN/fe9d86e1 — Seasonal Ground Cover (Landsat) Datasets integration level L2 higher (e.g.\ AusEFlux via THREDDS/OPeNDAP, GEE-based products, site-level API streams) read via simple COG HTTP range requests outside current scope nert.

Default 3L. nert.initial_delay Default initial retry delay seconds (doubles attempt).  Default 1L. Per-call values supplied via max_tries initial_delay arguments always override option.  Example:

title: nert (development version)
text: SMIPS date validator now uses per-collection earliest date. Requests totalbucket SMindex collections accepted back 2005-01-01 (archived earlier four bucket-level collections bucket1, bucket2, deepD, runoff, start 2015-01-01). Previously every SMIPS request 2015-01-01 rejected, valid 2005–2014 totalbucket / SMindex requests turned away. --range error message now also names requested collection. offline test suite now covers every dataset handler validator directly, addition existing end--end mocked tests, also exercises download retry/backoff logic verbose reporting path. Key-less test coverage (figure reported continuous integration, runs without TERN API key) now approximately 99.8%.

title: nert 1.1.0
text: Updated version, fixing number issues TERN dataset retrieval. read_smips() now tests correct day validating date requested raster. read_phenology() now provides access phenology datasets available TERN Data Portal, including monthly SGS/PGS/EGS. read_slga() provides access additional six datasets (CEC,ECE, AVP,PTO,DUL,L15), also allows user pull 05 95 percentile bounds, together span 90% interval. read_asc() now provides access data confusion index rasters using consistent interface rest read_*() functions. Documentation functions TERN datasets reviewed improved.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: First stable release. package matured 0.0.x development line presented complete user-facing surface — 11 exports covering 14 TERN datasets via unified read_tern() dispatcher batch primitive collect_tern_data() — along audit-driven polish accumulated pre-CRAN review.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: read_smips() argument day renamed date, matching unified argument naming used across read_*() functions. Existing code calling read_smips(day = ...) fail “unused argument” error; replace day = date =. rename introduced read_smips() reintroduced thin wrapper read_tern("SMIPS", ...) (PR #26) surfaced NEWS.md time; 1.0.0 entry corrects omission per #35.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: Retry behaviour now configurable via package options nert.max_tries (default 3L) nert.initial_delay (default 1L, seconds). Set globally , e.g., options(nert.max_tries = 5L, nert.initial_delay = 2L) .Rprofile apply across every read_*() collect_tern_data() call. Closes #20.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: collect_tern_data() now vectorised across locations. earlier implementation looped (location, dataset, date) tuples called read_tern() + terra::extract() per single point, redownloading Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF (COG) per location. refactored version plans list work items (one item per unique COG), opens COG via /vsicurl/, calls terra::extract() coordinates passed single SpatVector. M locations work-item budget K, function now performs K reads K extracts rather M × K .

title: nert 1.0.0
text: collect_tern_data() now predeclares every output column NA planning time. per-COG fetch failure leaves affected column NA without removing result, column count schema invariant network failure (non-SLGA static datasets longer disappear result transient fetch error). collect_tern_data() now always emits lon lat columns, including single-location calls (previously omitted one location passed), standardising output schema across call shapes. .check_collection_agreement() (SMIPS date validator) now uses documented 2015-11-20 lower bound (2005) emits grammatical, dated error messages. operator-precedence bug caused non-totalbucket collections bypass lower-bound check fixed. read_asc(confusion_index = NULL) previously silently took Confusion-Index branch via isFALSE(NULL) == FALSE. argument now strictly required single non-NA logical. .read_cog(max_tries = 0L) previously returned NULL silently loop body never executed; now errors clear message. Non-integer-coercible max_tries (e.g. "two") also rejected. .tern_dispatch_id() now rejects vector input rather silently collapsing first element. error message points users collect_tern_data() multi-dataset calls. read_phenology() missing year now surfaces documented 2003–2018 message rather R’s generic missing-argument message (year defaults NULL). validator also rejects non-integer values (e.g. 2018.5) vector years. Two vignette runnability defects fixed: agricultural vignette previously called read_smips(day = ...) (now date = ...) contained injected collect_tern_data() section whose output schema clobbered chunk--chunk smips_data variable used later analytics; replaced corrected, eval=FALSE showcase placed analytics. intro vignette’s two remaining day = ... calls also corrected. Prose corrections vignettes: Yield_tha → Yield_Tha (matches data column name); Ecological → Ecosystem (TERN’s actual expansion); vaporisation → volatilisation (consistent earlier paragraph chemistry); visualalising → visualising; SMindex scale described “0–100” rather “0–1” match COG. grain Rd description corrected: Variety factor 8 levels (matches levels(grain$Variety)), 10.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: portal.tern.org.au/metadata/TERN/<UUID> Rd references migrated geonetwork.tern.org.au/... URLs; several portal URLs returned HTTP 404 2026-05, GeoNetwork resolves UUIDs. dead www.clw.csiro.au/aclep/... URL replaced active esoil.io/TERNLandscapes/... equivalent. urlchecker::url_check() now clean.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: max_tries initial_delay arguments public read functions (read_tern(), read_aet(), read_asc(), read_canopy_height(), read_phenology(), read_slga(), read_smips(), read_soil_diversity()) now default NULL. NULL, values resolved call time getOption("nert.max_tries") getOption("nert.initial_delay"). non-breaking: existing user code passes explicit integers (e.g., read_tern("CANOPY", max_tries = 5L)) continues work unchanged still overrides option. New internal helper .init_nert_options() (R/zzz.R) populates package options .onLoad(). Pattern adapted rOpenSci read.abares package. sf removed Imports (zero references package code; legacy scaffolding never-delivered helper). nlme demoted Imports Suggests; used agricultural vignette, already declares %\VignetteDepends{nlme}. @import nlme directive pulled namespace without using removed. tests/testthat/test-validation.R substantially expanded test-collect_tern_data.R cover validation paths work-item planner (37 + 9 deterministic offline tests). Test coverage uplift. Eight new/expanded offline test files (test-url-snapshots.R, test-read_aet.R, test-read_slga.R, test-read_soil_diversity.R, test-read_canopy_height.R, test-read_phenology.R, test-collect_tern_data_mocked.R, test-read_asc.R) lift package coverage ~58% ~83%, every read_*() reader 100%. Mocking done internal .read_cog() binding via testthat::local_mocked_bindings(); test-url-snapshots.R pins every URL template via expect_snapshot(). Bumped testthat (>= 3.0.0) -> testthat (>= 3.2.0) Suggests local_mocked_bindings() support.

title: nert 0.0.4
text: AET URL prefix corrected /landscapes/aet/v2_2/ /model-derived/aet/v2_2/ .make_aet_url(). TERN’s bucket reorganisation moved CMRSET v2.2 model-derived classification (CMRSET CSIRO-modelled output, satellite landscape product); legacy path returns 301 → 401 GDAL /vsicurl/ propagate apikey:KEY@host userinfo across redirect, surfacing R [rast] file exist. Verified live TERN COG listing. read_slga() now applies toupper() attribute argument rlang::arg_match() (rather inside ), fixing ! 'arg' must symbol, call. error reported running help example. .TERN_ALIASES casing bug .tern_dispatch_id() resolved (incomplete rename surfaced PR #30; live name .tern_aliases). collect_tern_data() now correctly expands depth = "" eight SLGA datasets (AWC, CLY, SND, SLT, BDW, PHC, PHW, NTO) six GlobalSoilMap depth intervals, producing one column per (dataset, depth) named e.g. AWC_000_005. Previously literal string "" passed straight .read_tern_slga() rejected via rlang::arg_match(); resulting error silently swallowed eight SLGA datasets disappeared result. Returning 14 datasets SLGA depths now yields 60 columns (1 date + 6 SMIPS variants + ASC + AET + 8 SLGA x 6 depths + SOILDIV + CANOPY + PHENOLOGY). collect_tern_data() now surfaces fetch errors via cli::cli_warn() instead silently dropping failed dataset’s column. Failed cells contain NA; warning identifies dataset, date (applicable), underlying error message. Pairs SLGA fix ensure column count result matches verbose datasets-table announcement.

title: nert 0.0.4
text: Removed unused .create_sf() helper tests. Originally added scaffolding extract_aet() function never delivered. Removed unused .check_not_example_api_key() helper test. withr added Suggests test fixtures. tests/testthat/setup.R loads TERN_API_KEY ~/.Renviron network-dependent tests run R CMD check user key configured locally. CI continues skip network tests repository secret configured — intentional behaviour. roxyglobals moodymudskipper/devtag integrated @autoglobal @dev roxygen tag support; pkgdown reference index now builds without internal-helper warnings. Authors@R: Max Moldovan ORCID added.

title: nert 0.0.3.9000
text: Addition collect_tern_data() batch extraction TERN datasets one locations date range. Returns data.table one row per date per location. Supports 14 datasets, multi-location coordinate input (lon/lat vectors data.frame), column expansion multi-layer products (SLGA depths, SMIPS variants). Addition collect_tern_data vignette worked examples.

title: nert 0.0.2.9000
text: Unified read_tern() dispatcher supporting 14 TERN COG datasets via short aliases: SMIPS, ASC, AET, 8 SLGA soil attributes (AWC, CLY, SND, SLT, BDW, PHC, PHW, NTO), Soil Beta Diversity, Canopy Height, Land Surface Phenology. Convenience wrappers: read_slga(), read_soil_diversity(), read_canopy_height(), read_phenology().

Addition get_asc() get Australian Soil Classification data confusion index values pattern. See https://www.tern.org.au/news/news-australian-soil-classification-map/ data.
